title: fix/feat(deployer): add dynamicPackages bundler config for runtime-loaded packages and auto detect pino
summary: Adds a new `dynamicPackages` bundler config option for packages loaded dynamically at runtime that static analysis cannot detect (e.g., pino transports). Also implements automatic detection of pino transport targets via a Babel plugin that scans for `pino.transport({ target: '...' })` patterns. This fixes runtime crashes when deploying .mastra/output where dynamically-loaded packages were missing from the bundled package.json. Previously users had to abuse the `externals` config as a workaround. Changes span the deployer package (new Babel detection plugin, analyze.ts integration, bundler options type additions), core bundler types, e2e tests, documentation, and a changeset.
maintainerNotes: Approved by wardpeet. CI has some failures: 'Lint docs' failed, 'Full Test Suite' and 'Observability Package Tests' failed, 'E2E Tests' and 'Memory Tests' are still pending. The Lint docs and Observability/Full Test Suite failures are likely unrelated to this PR's deployer changes (the PR touches docs/src/content/en/reference/core/mastra-class.mdx which could cause a docs lint issue). Build, unit tests, combined store tests, workspace cloud tests, and code analysis all pass. The PR is well-structured with comprehensive unit tests for the pino transport detection (461 lines of tests), snapshot tests, e2e test additions, a fixture file, and updated documentation. The changeset is a patch for @mastra/deployer. Moved @mastra/server from devDependencies to dependencies in the deployer package. The approach cleanly separates 'dynamicPackages' (packages needed at runtime) from 'externals' (packages to exclude from bundling).
